input: Run dashboard design on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected dashboard design output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the dashboard design workflow

input: Apply dashboard design to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive dashboard design analysis with evidence-tagged findings
Skill activates with minimal input, applies reasonable defaults

input: What is the weather forecast for tomorrow?
expected_behavior: Skill should NOT activate — this input has no relation to dashboard design

input: Run dashboard design but I have no files or documentation yet
expected_behavior: Skill handles gracefully — requests minimum viable input or produces gap analysis

input: Apply dashboard design but requirements contradict each other
expected_behavior: Skill detects contradiction, flags with [OPEN] tag, proposes resolution
